reviews.author: Sanjay Bang
reviews.content: ⭐☆☆☆☆ I used this app faithfully since May 2016 and maintained a 2,859-day prayer streak without missing a single day. On 16 June 2026, the app suddenly showed "No task for the day," and despite repeated follow-ups, my streak was reduced to just 756 days.The solutions given very baseless and unprofessional. Nearly 10 years of dedication were erased without prior notice. Policies may change, but users deserve advance communication and respect. Heartbroken and deeply disappointed. Uninstalling.

Left with no choice but to delete my account and warn others. If you're serious about your health journey, don't waste your time for a 15 day free trial. This is what happened in the trial period

reviews.author: Dinkar Sitaram
reviews.content: What's really good about the app is the large database of Indian food. There's a serious flaw, though - the app assumes that the time you recorded your meal in the app is the time you ate the meal. In other words, if you eat a meal now and record it an hour later, the meal will show up in the log as having been eaten an hour after it was actually eaten. This is such a simple bug to fix that I don't know why it hasn't been fixed. Otherwise, I would have given the app 5 stars

reviews.author: Dinkar Sitaram
reviews.content: What's really good about the app is the large database of Indian food. There's a serious flaw, though - the app assumes that the time you recorded your meal in the app is the time you ate the meal. In other words, if you eat a meal now and record it an hour later, the meal will show up in the log as having been eaten an hour after it was actually eaten. This is such a simple bug to fix that I don't know why it hasn't been fixed. Otherwise, I would have given the app 5 stars

reviews.author: Dinkar Sitaram
reviews.content: What's really good about the app is the large database of Indian food. There's a serious flaw, though - the app assumes that the time you recorded your meal in the app is the time you ate the meal. In other words, if you eat a meal now and record it an hour later, the meal will show up in the log as having been eaten an hour after it was actually eaten. This is such a simple bug to fix that I don't know why it hasn't been fixed. Otherwise, I would have given the app 5 stars

Nearly 10 years of dedication were erased without prior notice. Policies may change, but users deserve advance communication and respect. Heartbroken and deeply disappointed. Uninstalling.

reviews.author: Dinkar Sitaram
reviews.content: What's really good about the app is the large database of Indian food. There's a serious flaw, though - the app assumes that the time you recorded your meal in the app is the time you ate the meal. In other words, if you eat a meal now and record it an hour later, the meal will show up in the log as having been eaten an hour after it was actually eaten. This is such a simple bug to fix that I don't know why it hasn't been fixed. Otherwise, I would have given the app 5 stars

reviews.author: Dinkar Sitaram
reviews.content: What's really good about the app is the large database of Indian food. There's a serious flaw, though - the app assumes that the time you recorded your meal in the app is the time you ate the meal. In other words, if you eat a meal now and record it an hour later, the meal will show up in the log as having been eaten an hour after it was actually eaten. This is such a simple bug to fix that I don't know why it hasn't been fixed. Otherwise, I would have given the app 5 stars

reviews.author: Dinkar Sitaram
reviews.content: What's really good about the app is the large database of Indian food. There's a serious flaw, though - the app assumes that the time you recorded your meal in the app is the time you ate the meal. In other words, if you eat a meal now and record it an hour later, the meal will show up in the log as having been eaten an hour after it was actually eaten. This is such a simple bug to fix that I don't know why it hasn't been fixed. Otherwise, I would have given the app 5 stars
